programme.title: E1 - Little Britain

programme.title: E1 - Too Hot To Handle
programme.desc: Lexus and Sriracha are teaming up and they want Ryan to build them a spicy Lexus IS. But it's never easy creating one of a kind masterpieces.

programme.title: E1 - Welcome To The Chaos
programme.desc: Six teams arrive in Tucson, Arizona, for a racing competition with $5K hoopties. Then the teams must build and modify their vehicles for the final drag race.

programme.title: E3 - BMW
programme.desc: There is more to BMW than fast cars and sleek racing lines. BMW makes mean motorbikes. This is where you find out more about how this all came about.

programme.desc: Ian's LJ Buggy has seen a ton of rocks and off-road driving, and he's learned ways to improve the rig.

programme.title: Phoenix Panorama
programme.desc: PHOENIX PANORAMA : To entertain, educate and inform audiences, Panoramic Eyeshot of Phoenix, a series of captivating and controversial documentaries, includes segments on current affairs, historical anniversaries and exclusive insider views on present developments.
PHOENIX EVENING EXPRESS: Phoenix Evening Express reports world events with in-depth coverage of the latest social, economic, cultural and sports news from Mainland China, Taiwan and Hong Kong.

programme.title: E162
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.
SUMMARY OF PRESS: Providing a concise review of what's in the press, the show highlights the important news by presenting newspaper headlines and editorial from respected.
PHOENIX MORNING EXPRESS: The bright and early morning news program has all the ingredients to get the audience off to a great start.
PHOENIX MORNING EXPRESS: The bright and early morning news program has all the ingredients to get the audience off to a great start.

programme.title: Phoenix Panorama
programme.desc: PHOENIX PANORAMA : To entertain, educate and inform audiences, Panoramic Eyeshot of Phoenix, a series of captivating and controversial documentaries, includes segments on current affairs, historical anniversaries and exclusive insider views on present developments.
PHOENIX MIDDAY EXPRESS: Presenting the most update international and financial news breaking before lunch, viewers can turn it to stay informed about events happening around the world.

programme.title: E432
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

programme.title: Phoenix Panorama
programme.desc: PHOENIX PANORAMA : To entertain, educate and inform audiences, Panoramic Eyeshot of Phoenix, a series of captivating and controversial documentaries, includes segments on current affairs, historical anniversaries and exclusive insider views on present developments.

programme.title: E230
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Each episode of My Hong Kong Story features a Hong Kong native, or those who surround their tale here. Interviewees convey their indigenized story in a personnel aspect. With a 15-minute essence per episode, the cinematic language brings a new perspective to observe Hong Kong for Chinese-speaking audience around the world. Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.
PHOENIX FOCUS : Focusing on the global political issues and major social events. Phoenix focus delivers news highlights to viewers, presenting authoritative views.

programme.desc: Otto heads to the Congo River using a dugout canoe. As civil war rages in the region, an encounter with armed militia could have fatal consequences.

programme.title: E14 - Bring Out The Monster
programme.desc: Keith and Jake defend their grounds from encroaching trawlers. Sig struggles to keep his vessel operational under the pressure of a looming offload.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Mike trades a classic Citroen for an F-Type Jag. Later, he visits a classic car auction to test the market and tries his hand at Crown Green Bowls.

programme.title: E1 - Dont Knock Doc
programme.desc: Locals in Ohio compete for $5,000 and a chance to take on Street Outlaw Doc for another $5,000. And a small-tyre racer is racing for a cause.

programme.title: E6 - The Center Of Africa - Lost In The Jungle
programme.desc: On his final leg in Africa Otto struggles as tropical rainfall make progress difficult and drinking water becomes scarce.

programme.title: E2 - Virginia Is For Racers
programme.desc: The fastest small-tire racers in VA come to show off their skills, and the competition is fierce. One cocky racer comes face to face with Boddie Jr.

programme.desc: Mike has found a rare, 33-year-old Peugeot 405 while in Portugal. But finding parts isn't going to be easy. Can Mike and Elvis turn a profit?

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: The 51 Percent
programme.desc: The 51 Percent is revolving around women and their role in the world. The program presents various stories of women with different backgrounds, women fighting for equality, women in politics and their work, women promoting sexual education all over the world, women in sports, and women on the front line.

programme.title: E2015-363
programme.desc: While symbolic of Japanese culture, bamboo is also an extremely unique plant with curious qualities that have charmed researchers in many scientific fields, as well as people all over the country.

programme.title: NHK News 7
programme.desc: An evening news bulletin that provides Japan's views on many domestic and international news events.

programme.title: E6053-006
programme.desc: Matsue is known as the 'city of water.' It is home to Lake Shinji, which is famous for its shijimi clams. Through beautiful time-lapse footage, we see the lake's changing colours and expressions.

programme.title: E6030-035

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: FIA World Rally Championship Highlights 2026 E8 -Rally Greece
Coupe de France 2025/26 E30 -Lorient vs Nice - QF
TotalEnergies CAF Champions League 2025/26 E6 -Pyramids FC vs Rivers
FIA World Rally Championship Highlights 2026 E8 -Rally Greece
E1 - The Gateway To The Verdon
programme.desc: At the gateway to the Verdon, Hugo Guinet harvests spinach and raises chickens. Philippe de Santis heads off in search of truffles, once cleaned his precious harvest will be sold at the market in Aups. And, to end, we go hiking in the mountains to discover their biodiversity.

programme.title: E13 - Louvignies Castle: A Jewel Of Belgian Heritage
programme.desc: Nathalie Guirma visits Louvignies Castle with its lively owner, Florence de Moreau de Villegas de Saint-Pierre. A place full of refinement, where the hostess organizes evenings in the spirit of ''Downton Abbey.''

programme.title: E88 - Chalons-En-Champagne (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Chalons-en-Champagne, meeting local residents at the market. Today, she looks at fossils and the bubbly Chalons biscuit.

programme.title: E13 - Louvignies Castle: A Jewel Of Belgian Heritage
programme.desc: Nathalie Guirma visits Louvignies Castle with its lively owner, Florence de Moreau de Villegas de Saint-Pierre. A place full of refinement, where the hostess organizes evenings in the spirit of ''Downton Abbey.''

programme.title: E10 - The Flavour Of The Middle Ages
programme.desc: For Pierre Chatelain, preparing recipes with mediaeval flavour is a sacred quest that brings pure happiness. Using produce that is authentic, local and seasonal he sets out to surprise our palate with unknown flavours that take us back to the world of yesteryear.

programme.title: E88 - Chalons-En-Champagne (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Chalons-en-Champagne, meeting local residents at the market. Today, she looks at fossils and the bubbly Chalons biscuit.

programme.desc: Nathalie Guirma visits Louvignies Castle with its lively owner, Florence de Moreau de Villegas de Saint-Pierre. A place full of refinement, where the hostess organizes evenings in the spirit of ''Downton Abbey.''

programme.title: E5 - Dave
programme.desc: Dave presents his adopted village, Saumane-de-Vaucluse. An intimate, musical escape into the heart of the Provence the artist holds dear.

programme.title: E88 - Chalons-En-Champagne (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Chalons-en-Champagne, meeting local residents at the market. Today, she looks at fossils and the bubbly Chalons biscuit.

programme.title: E1 - The Gateway To The Verdon
programme.desc: At the gateway to the Verdon, Hugo Guinet harvests spinach and raises chickens. Philippe de Santis heads off in search of truffles, once cleaned his precious harvest will be sold at the market in Aups. And, to end, we go hiking in the mountains to discover their biodiversity.

programme.title: E13 - Louvignies Castle: A Jewel Of Belgian Heritage
programme.desc: Nathalie Guirma visits Louvignies Castle with its lively owner, Florence de Moreau de Villegas de Saint-Pierre. A place full of refinement, where the hostess organizes evenings in the spirit of ''Downton Abbey.''

programme.title: E22 - Anthony Limery
programme.desc: Chef Anthony Limery blends traditional French cuisine with Afro-Caribbean influences. On today's menu: black lentils in coconut milk.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.desc: The development of a new, larger spacecraft with a cargo bay would revolutionize space travel, but someone would need to drive it.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: A poor 305ci Chevy small-block is the victim of a test of how much nitrous oxide power can be tolerated.

programme.title: E4 - Entering the Wolf Den & Wild Deer Carcass Feeding Frenzy!
programme.desc: Coyote meets rescued foxes, then feeds a deer carcass to a pack of powerful gray wolves!

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E264 - Plankton's Intern / Patrick's Tantrum
programme.desc: Plankton needs help stealing the formula, so he hires an intern who knows more about Mr. Krabs than anyone. // Patrick goes into a destructive fit whenever he hears a bell, so his friends help him in their own ways.

programme.title: E109 - Party Party
programme.desc: Thinking she hasn't been invited to Bibi's party Jade sneaks in.

programme.title: E211 - The Unusual Suspects
programme.desc: With some loose Mutagen at stake, Mikey questions Rod's siblings, the notorious and eccentric MAUDE and TODD... both of whom are trying to get their hands on some mutant blood as well. Can Mikey find Rod before it's too late?

programme.title: E282 - Ain't That The Tooth
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick mistake a burglar for the tooth fairy.

programme.title: E904 - Pet Project / Cuff Break
programme.desc: When Mom and the twins win a raffle to spend a weekend at a resort, Lana struggles to leave her pets behind. // After Lincoln tests a magic trick on Grouse, they get handcuffed together and Grouse has to spend the day at middle school.

programme.title: E212 - Imeet Fred
programme.desc: Freddie says on the air that he is not a fan of internet sensation Fred, causing Fred to announce the end of his videos forever. Fans are infuriated that Freddie has caused an end to the popular videos.

programme.title: E624 - Day Of The Dad / Small Blunder
programme.desc: Lori struggles to make a good impression on Bobby's dad after accidentally pushing him into a puddle. // Desperate to have the best show-and-tell in class, Lily takes Lisa's shrink ray to school.

programme.title: E264 - Plankton's Intern / Patrick's Tantrum
programme.desc: Plankton needs help stealing the formula, so he hires an intern who knows more about Mr. Krabs than anyone. // Patrick goes into a destructive fit whenever he hears a bell, so his friends help him in their own ways.

programme.title: E209 - Times Machine / Super Tim / Uncle Tiberius
programme.desc: Tim and Tia build a time machine to avoid telling Dad the truth. // Tim goes to DinoStar's training academy, but is confused by his hero's training methods. // Uncle Tiberius comes to visit the Rexes, and Tim must be on his best behaviour.

programme.title: E117 - Queen Thistle's Day Off / Nature Class
programme.desc: Queen Thistle goes to visit her sister, so Holly, Ben, Nanny and the King have to look after naughty twins Daisy and Poppy for the day. // Nanny Plum and The Wise Old Elf take the children for a lesson in the woods about nature.

programme.title: E311 - The Crew Builds A Rotating Restaurant
programme.desc: The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: E250 - Daddy Pig's Birthday
programme.desc: Today is Daddy Pig's birthday, but he has to go to work. While he is away, Mummy Pig, Peppa and George prepare a special birthday surprise.

programme.title: E251 - Sleepover
programme.desc: Peppa is going for a sleepover at Zoe Zebra's house with Suzy Sheep, Rebecca Rabbit, Candy Cat and Emily Elephant. The girls stay up playing games and having fun. At last they feel sleepy. They all snuggle up in their sleeping bags and fall asleep.

programme.title: E303 - Pedro's Cough
programme.desc: Pedro gets a contagious cough at daycare and other children soon catch it. When it's time to go the grown-ups catch it too, including Madame Gazelle. Doctor Brown Bear gives them terrible-tasting medicine, but who will look after him when he is sick?

programme.title: E115 - The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: E314 - Pups Save A Robosaurus / Pups Save A Film Festival
programme.desc: When a homemade Robotic Dino named Earl comes to life, the pups need to find him, stop him, and bring him home. // The pups are shooting their Film Festival entry until Daring Danny X cuts the action with his dangerous stunt.

programme.title: E126 - The Crew Builds A Treehouse / The Crew Builds A Chicken Feeder
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose's favorite tree might be off limits for climbing unless Rubble and Grandpa can come up with a solution. / The Crew build a feeder for Farmer Zoe's chickens, but when they get loose, it's up to the pups to safely rescue them.

programme.title: E212 - The Crew Builds A Ballpark / The Crew Builds A Surf Bridge
programme.desc: When Rubble's favorite baseball star Aaron Judge can't get out of town to the home run derby, Rubble & Crew build a stadium to hold the derby right in Builder Cove! // Surf's up for Rubble & Crew! Well, if they can get over the super hot sand, it is.

programme.title: E908 - Pups Save The Hatchlings / Pups Save A Wrongway Farmhand
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger decides to make the world's biggest omelet, he accidentally orders the wrong kind of eggs - ones that hatch. // Traveling Travis volunteers to watch Farmer Yumi and Farmer Al's Farm and characteristically messes up everything.

programme.title: E912 - Pups Stop The Return Of Humsquatch / Pups Save A Lonely Ghost
programme.desc: When Eddie and Emmy get impatient at the carnival, they hide in Mayor Humdinger's Humsquatch costume to chase everyone out. // Rubble dreams that he meets a ghost and learns that it's not easy to help a ghost make new friends.

programme.title: E117 - Queen Thistle's Day Off / Nature Class
programme.desc: Queen Thistle goes to visit her sister, so Holly, Ben, Nanny and the King have to look after naughty twins Daisy and Poppy for the day. // Nanny Plum and The Wise Old Elf take the children for a lesson in the woods about nature.

programme.title: E113 - Crabby Boots / Papi's Picnic Party
programme.desc: Dora and Boots meet Shelly, a hermit crab missing her shell, who uses one of Boots' boots. Dora travels across the beach in search of her old shell. // Papi is having a quesadilla picnic, but he forgot the ingredients! Dora sets off to deliver them.

programme.title: E724 - The Robot Championship
programme.desc: It's the Robot Championship - and only the fastest, strongest, smartest robot will win! Using coding, can Blaze win enough sports to take home the Robot Championship trophy?

programme.title: E709 - Renewable Energy Racers
programme.desc: Blaze and his friends have renewable energy engines! And when the Gas Guzzler steals everyone's gas, they'll have to use renewable energy to finish the race!

programme.title: E107 - The Crew Builds A Beaver Home / The Crew Fixes A Road
programme.desc: The power is out in Builder Cove! When the pups find out a beaver is to blame, they've got to build him a new home to bring the power back. // When Speed Meister damages the road ahead of the town helper parade, the pups work fast to repave the way.

programme.title: E118 - The Toy Robot / Big Bad Barry
programme.desc: The friends fix a broken toy robot, but it begins to act very strange due to the magic key they put in it. // King Thistle goes fishing with Mr Elf, Ben & Holly, and decides they should catch the meanest fish ever - Big Bad Barry - for their supper.

programme.title: E109 - Let Justice Be Done / The Great Spring Clean
programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.title: E250 - Daddy Pig's Birthday
programme.desc: Today is Daddy Pig's birthday, but he has to go to work. While he is away, Mummy Pig, Peppa and George prepare a special birthday surprise.

programme.title: E251 - Sleepover
programme.desc: Peppa is going for a sleepover at Zoe Zebra's house with Suzy Sheep, Rebecca Rabbit, Candy Cat and Emily Elephant. The girls stay up playing games and having fun. At last they feel sleepy. They all snuggle up in their sleeping bags and fall asleep.

programme.title: E118 - The Toy Robot / Big Bad Barry
programme.desc: The friends fix a broken toy robot, but it begins to act very strange due to the magic key they put in it. // King Thistle goes fishing with Mr Elf, Ben & Holly, and decides they should catch the meanest fish ever - Big Bad Barry - for their supper.

programme.title: E614 - Pups Save A Bat Family / Pups Save A Mud Monster
programme.desc: A rockslide traps a Bat Family inside their cave, so the Pups have to free them! The bats search for a new home leads to problems in town though! // Snowboarders on Jake's Mountain are stuck on a broken chair lift while a monster is on the loose!

programme.title: E924 - Pups Save A Jukebox
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger steals a jukebox so he can play an annoying song all day long. Chase and Rubble track it down to save the records.

programme.title: E109 - Let Justice Be Done / The Great Spring Clean
programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.desc: Believed to bring luck, Vrinda marries her dream man, Sanjay, who loves Divya. Living as a caretaker, she faces silent sacrifices, unsure if fate will choose her.

Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: E68
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E130
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: E337 - 2
programme.desc: Time flew by, yet Tulsi Virani stood strong as the Sarvagunn matriarch! Can she navigate the challenges of modern-day parenting and relationships?

programme.title: E147
programme.desc: Shivprasad and Shalini, an ordinary married couple, embrace love, laughter, and everyday joys, weaving a simple yet fulfilling life that celebrates togetherness and quiet contentment.

programme.title: E72
programme.desc: Aparajita, a talented artist haunted by her past, crosses paths with Rakshit, a reserved businessman. Though he avoids romance, their unexpected connection might just lead to true love.

programme.title: E840
programme.desc: Sayali desires a fairytale romance, but fate intertwines her with Sachin, a complex figure. Will her dreams of a perfect life survive this unexpected connection?

programme.title: E5210
programme.desc: Dr. Abhimanyu, a misogynist, falls for Akshara, their daughter. Complications arise when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, also falls for him.

programme.title: E2066
programme.desc: Anupamaa sacrifices her ambitions for family, feeling uncredited. She finds empowerment by living on her terms after trials, showcasing a dramatic journey of resilience and independence.

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 一部以專門經營鬼客人的的士為題材的電視劇。以實現鬼神們最後願望的的士司機為中心，敘述多種多樣的故事。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 資訊工程學系和模特兒系意外合併，燃起了一段閃耀的青春戀情。人氣網紅模特兒姜敏學和對愛情一無所知的優等生朱妍山，成為了新合併系的宣傳模特兒。他們個性上的碰撞，成就了一個溫馨爆笑的愛情故事。

programme.title: E1 - Taiwan (Eng Subs)
programme.desc: Innovative youths in Taiwan launch ground-up initiatives that are transforming traditional industries in their rural hometowns. This episode looks at how they did it and the differences they've made.

programme.title: E2 - Vietnam (Eng Subs)
programme.desc: A new generation of Vietnamese carves a future they want to own. They're empowering rural communities, and weaving tradition into progress. What will it take to define success on their own terms?

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Birthday Adventure
programme.desc: Join JJ for his birthday adventures! He has a balloon boat race, a surprise party on the bus, and plays follow-the-leader with Dad. Go on a magical train ride and help find the missing birthday dog, Bingo!

programme.title: E13 - A Birthday Full of Surprises!
programme.desc: It's a day of celebrations with Baby John! First, it's his birthday with cake and presents. Then, he accidentally ruins his sister Jill's spa party. Finally, he uses his imagination to travel to a prehistoric world for Dino's birthday!

programme.title: E1 - Fruits, Cupcakes, Snacks & Ice Cream!
programme.desc: It's a day of yummy adventures with fruits, cupcakes, snacks & ice cream! Pogo wants to pick a delicious fruit from a tree, but he hilariously learns that he has to be patient & wait for it to ripen! Then, Lulu is determined to bake a cupcake all by herself, but her mixture turns into a giant cupcake blob that takes over the Playpod! Plus, Fuse is craving a snack but can't get the box open & Pogo's ice cream keeps melting!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate teamwork & rescue special with Kii & Yii! The adventure begins when Princess Cat is flying her plane but gets in a sticky jammy mess, causing her to lose control! It's up to Kii & Yii to get her down safely. Then, the friends are playing near Princess Cat's castle when she accidentally falls down the well & needs to be rescued again! From helping Humpty Dumpty to rounding up runaway vegetables, Kii & Yii always save the day!

programme.title: E10 - JJ's Day of Birthday Wishes!
programme.desc: Join JJ, Cody, CeCe, and Nina for a day full of birthday celebrations! From a dinosaur-themed party to a fun piÃ±ata surprise and a magical party in the clouds, it's a whirlwind of cake, games, and presents for everyone.

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Birthday Adventure
programme.desc: Join JJ for his birthday adventures! He has a balloon boat race, a surprise party on the bus, and plays follow-the-leader with Dad. Go on a magical train ride and help find the missing birthday dog, Bingo!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Get Curious & Creative!
programme.desc: It's time for Blippi to get curious & creative! A mysterious book appears in the clubhouse, & when Blippi opens it, the brand-new Curiosity Crew jumps out! After helping the crew figure out what they're looking for (popsicles!), Blippi & Meekah join them on some creative adventures. They learn all about how to mix colors to make a beautiful rainbow painting, shrink down to dance with Bendjamin the Klutz & ride a library cart on a hunt for books about dinosaurs!

programme.title: E13 - A Birthday Full of Surprises!
programme.desc: It's a day of celebrations with Baby John! First, it's his birthday with cake and presents. Then, he accidentally ruins his sister Jill's spa party. Finally, he uses his imagination to travel to a prehistoric world for Dino's birthday!

programme.title: E3 - A BIG Birthday Surprise!
programme.desc: Join JJ and his animal pals for Emmy the elephant's birthday! Play a game of musical chairs, go on a submarine ride to see colorful sharks, and help rescue Mochi's rubber ducky at the beach. It's an animal-filled day of fun and adventure!

programme.title: E10 - JJ's Day of Birthday Wishes!
programme.desc: Join JJ, Cody, CeCe, and Nina for a day full of birthday celebrations! From a dinosaur-themed party to a fun piÃ±ata surprise and a magical party in the clouds, it's a whirlwind of cake, games, and presents for everyone.

programme.title: The Melon Patch S1E4 -Feel Big Feelings!
programme.desc: Ms. Appleberry and the Melon Patch teachers navigate big feelings with stories and songs, helping kids recognize and name emotions like happy, angry, and sad. We learn that all feelings are okay, and that they can change too!

programme.title: E10 - JJ's Day of Birthday Wishes!
programme.desc: Join JJ, Cody, CeCe, and Nina for a day full of birthday celebrations! From a dinosaur-themed party to a fun piÃ±ata surprise and a magical party in the clouds, it's a whirlwind of cake, games, and presents for everyone.

programme.title: E3 - A BIG Birthday Surprise!
programme.desc: Join JJ and his animal pals for Emmy the elephant's birthday! Play a game of musical chairs, go on a submarine ride to see colorful sharks, and help rescue Mochi's rubber ducky at the beach. It's an animal-filled day of fun and adventure!

programme.title: E6 - Magic, A Blob, A Show & A Bubble!
programme.desc: Join Bubbles for a day of magic, a blob, a show & a bubble! First, Bubbles is excited to watch Pogo's magic show, but her curiosity gets the better of her & she spoils his tricks! Then, she invents a brand new bouncy blob, but it bounces out of control & causes havoc all over the Bodpod! The adventures continue as Bubbles gets stage fright before a big show & tries her best to stop a giant, beautiful bubble from popping.

programme.title: E3 - A Sick Trick, A Spider, A Bump & A Fly!
programme.desc: The Minibods are dealing with a sick trick, a spider, a bump & a fly! First, Jeff is sick, but after he recovers, he misses the attention & pretends he's still unwell! Then, Fuse is woken up by spooky noises in the night & must put on a brave face for Lulu to investigate. His bravery is tested again when he finds a spider in his gym & doesn't know how to get it out. The chaos ends when Pogo can't sleep & has to deal with a very noisy fly!

programme.desc: Financial Journal gives in-depth analysis and up-to-date financial news such as stock, commodity, currency market and exchange rate from Great China and around the world.

programme.desc: News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.

programme.title: Phoenix Financial Daily Report
programme.desc: Phoenix Financial Daily Report : Aims to help audience figure out the financial clues from a choice selection of the hottest news of the day. The show also links up with experts from related fields to offer their profound insights. Presenting the latest figures and conducting public surveys on important topics, Phoenix Financial Daily Report generates a sweeping view on the trends that will bring you unique investment opportunity.

Le Journal De France 2:2025-2026
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: E11 - Kodjo Koublenou (Togo)
programme.desc: Sourdough breads, brioches and generous recipes are the keys to his success on social networks. Known under the pseudonym Cook as you feel it, Kodjo is a self-taught cook who arrived from Togo in France. A father and inspiring creator, he turns a childhood passion into a space for emancipation.

programme.title: Aankh Micholi
programme.desc: Three cousins, Laadli Chibber, Bajrang Das Khatri and Shikhar Randhawa, embrace the warmth of a new city when they move to Mumbai, but they also face challenges that transform their lives.

E1316 - Space House Part 2/Space House Part 3/Space House Part 4/Cy & Beasty/T Is For Titans
programme.desc: After Beast Boy steals the power ring and jumps into Zatanna's hat, Green Lantern must deal with being powerless as she and her friends give chase.

programme.title: E99 - Bismuth/Earthlings
programme.desc: Steven discovers something the Gems thought was lost to the past inside of Lion's mane.

programme.title: E47 - A. Video Games References/Cool School/Kicking A Ball And Pretending To Be Hurt/Head F
programme.desc: The Titans immerse themselves in different video game worlds.

programme.title: E133 - Telephone Pole Gags 2: Shrinking Telephone Pole / In The Road Again!/Happy Birdy To Y
programme.desc: Tweety spies a puddy from his perch.

programme.title: E8 - B. Franken Kitty/Tom-Foolery/Haunted Mouse/Here's Looking A-Choo Kid!/Superfied
programme.desc: Dr Bigby creates a machine to turn back the hands of time for his beloved cat Wilson. Tom is trying to break into the lab to eat Jerry and Napoleon, and accidentally gets mistaken for a young Wilson and is taken home. Tom must convince Dr. Bigby he's got the wrong cat! Jerry and Napoleon are left with the real Wilson, who is a mean vicious cat.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Martial Arts Tour
programme.desc: Brian Le, one of the stars of the action-packed film “The Furious,” recently visited Hong Kong for a passionate martial arts pilgrimage. Besides visiting the 'Bruce Lee Exhibition' to pay tribute to the legendary master, he also visited a martial arts school to meet with Master Sam Lau, a first-generation disciple of Ip Man, and engage in a martial arts exchange! Brian will now reveal the highlights of his exhilarating martial arts pilgrimage!

programme.title: Adventure of The King
programme.desc: Emperor Zhengde of the Ming Dynasty is young and playful, privately escapes from Palace to avoid the appointed marriage. He loses his memory by accident and luckily comes across Ms. Li to take care him. Prince Ningxia takes this opportunity to rebel the kingdom and catch the emperor to execute him immediately at the execution ground. At a critical time, three entourages rescue the Emperor and the prince Ningxia is arrested. However, Ms Li has refused to get marriage with the emperor due to his cheating on her love feelings.

programme.title: My First Of May
programme.desc: My First of May follows TANG Suk Yin and his daughter TANG Chi, whose lives are turned upside down when Chi is diagnosed with a serious illness, given little chance to survive past two. Faced with this heart-wrenching reality, Suk Yin and his wife, Elaine YEUNG, promise to cherish every moment with Chi. Miraculously, Chi survives beyond two, but this brings significant changes. The couple sacrifices their dreams to care for her-Suk Yin gives up his squash career, while Elaine, overwhelmed by pressure, abandons the family. In despair, Suk Yin withdraws and becomes a recluse. Without parental support, Chi relies on her grandmother, SUEN Yau Mui. When her grandmother's health deteriorates, Suk Yin can no longer ignore his responsibilities and returns home. After years apart, how will they mend their strained relationships? Unexpectedly, a small understanding from the past helps them reconnect. With Suk Yin's support, Chi gains movement in her ring finger, rekindling love in the

programme.title: House of Fury
programme.desc: A mysterious person arrived in his wheelchair in Yue's Clinic and asked for a person called Tai Chi Lung. Later on, Yue was found disappeared, leaving behind his clinic a mess...

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Martial Arts Tour
programme.desc: Brian Le, one of the stars of the action-packed film “The Furious,” recently visited Hong Kong for a passionate martial arts pilgrimage. Besides visiting the 'Bruce Lee Exhibition' to pay tribute to the legendary master, he also visited a martial arts school to meet with Master Sam Lau, a first-generation disciple of Ip Man, and engage in a martial arts exchange! Brian will now reveal the highlights of his exhilarating martial arts pilgrimage!

programme.title: Long And Winding Road
programme.desc: A story about two different men each finding their true meanings in life. LESLIE and TONY, two lower middle-class bachelors, are bosom friends. Leslie is a wandering soul who seems unable to settle down. He got fired and his girlfriend left him. Tony is a frustrating musician and a part-time worker at an elderly home. He doesn't like old people, but works there only to get close to his dream girl WAI...

programme.title: Aces Go Places
programme.desc: The Mafia is concluding a secret deal in Hong Kong when the loot to be handed over, a consignment of valuable diamonds, is stolen by someone who left a white glove. Based on this clue, the police thinks that it is the work of the infamous international thief 'White Glove' Interpol is contacted and an ace detective, Baldy, is sent from New York to investigate. He is assisted by a local woman inspector known for her toughness. They start on a wrong footing initially but grow to be very fond of one another...

programme.title: Tiger Cage III
programme.desc: James and John are working in the Commercial Crime Bureau. Jointly they look into a case of which the suspect is an influential rich business man called Lee. James has a girl friend called Suki who is working for Wong, Lee's accountant. One night, in a party holding by Lee, John hears by chance the internal tips on a stock that Lee and his staff are talking about. John thus takes out all his saving and buys that stock. In the meantime, since Wong is murdered and James is also assaulted and seriously burnt, the case is closed under great pressure. On the other hand, the price of the stock which John has invested heavily slides. John is thus deeply depressed. Six months later, James has been much recovered under the care of two old men. At this time, Suki has climbed up to be a senior and important person in Wong's firm. Even Lee becomes a blocking stone in her eyes...

programme.title: Long And Winding Road
programme.desc: A story about two different men each finding their true meanings in life. LESLIE and TONY, two lower middle-class bachelors, are bosom friends. Leslie is a wandering soul who seems unable to settle down. He got fired and his girlfriend left him. Tony is a frustrating musician and a part-time worker at an elderly home. He doesn't like old people, but works there only to get close to his dream girl WAI...

programme.title: The Occupant
programme.desc: Angie was an undergraduate from Canada who was in holiday in Hong Kong as well as doing research work for her thesis - 'Chinese Superstition'. She looked for accommodation and met Hansom. While Angie disguised herself as a ghost to scare Hansom, he was thrown out of the window by a genuine ghost. Detective Valentino came to investigate the accident and they unfolded the actual happening of the tragic evening when Singer Lisa Law had shot her lover...

programme.title: E1 - Born to Be Different
programme.desc: This episode of Amazing Animal Friends features a duck that won’t go in the water without a ride from her pooch pal, an elephant that thinks she’s a buffalo, and a herd of cows that adopt an orphaned deer.

programme.title: E2 - Super Powers
programme.desc: See the animals that push the limits of physics, chemistry and engineering to pull off feats that humans can only dream of, and find out how evolution granted them with such amazing abilities. Sometimes it takes a super-power just to survive.

programme.title: E2 - Namib: Land Of Extremes
programme.desc: The Namib Desert is a land of extremes, from icy ocean to baking sand. It takes toughness and adaptation to live in this desert, and only a special few can. From the sidewinding adder to the fog-collecting beetle, each animal has their tricks for survival in the Namib.

programme.title: E3 - The Last Desert Giants
programme.desc: The Namib is the oldest desert in the world, hugging Africa’s shoreline for over 400 kilometers. It is one of the most inhospitable habitats on earth. Yet the world’s largest land mammal has made a home here, adapted through behavior and designed to life in the extreme.

programme.title: E1 - Born to Be Different
programme.desc: This episode of Amazing Animal Friends features a duck that won’t go in the water without a ride from her pooch pal, an elephant that thinks she’s a buffalo, and a herd of cows that adopt an orphaned deer.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E2 - Class Reunion
programme.desc: Follow new graduate Beni, who gets an exciting introduction to jungle college alongside former classmates Sura, Meryl, and Wine. Check on new arrival Molly and join Dr. Nadine as she grades slowpoke Bumi and wild child Monita on their latest lessons.

programme.title: E5 - A Pangolin's Plight
programme.desc: Feel heartbreak when Dr. Amanda’s team loses a pangolin abused by wildlife traffickers, but cheer when another is released post-rehab. Check on a trio of hedgehogs and tag along as the center’s baboons and nyala antelopes get a change of scenery.

programme.title: E6 - Crocodile Capers
programme.desc: Strap in for Dr. Amanda’s risky attempt to collar a wild roan antelope. Later, chase down blue monkey Indigo while unrest ensues among the vervets. Examine an eagle owl with bumblefoot and say adieu to Sheila the croc, who’s headed back to the wild.

programme.title: E2 - A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends including Charlotte, a schnauzer who enjoys bath time with her guinea pig pal Wallace, and a randy ram called Hamish who likes to sneak off to live with a herd of dairy cows instead of his own kind.

programme.title: E3 - Invisible World
programme.desc: Dive into a dazzling world beyond human perception, where animals use their super senses to detect light we can’t see, sound we can’t hear and even stranger forces we can’t begin to detect.

programme.desc: See the animals that push the limits of physics, chemistry and engineering to pull off feats that humans can only dream of, and find out how evolution granted them with such amazing abilities. Sometimes it takes a super-power just to survive.

programme.title: E2 - Namib: Land Of Extremes
programme.desc: The Namib Desert is a land of extremes, from icy ocean to baking sand. It takes toughness and adaptation to live in this desert, and only a special few can. From the sidewinding adder to the fog-collecting beetle, each animal has their tricks for survival in the Namib.

programme.title: E3 - The Last Desert Giants
programme.desc: The Namib is the oldest desert in the world, hugging Africa’s shoreline for over 400 kilometers. It is one of the most inhospitable habitats on earth. Yet the world’s largest land mammal has made a home here, adapted through behavior and designed to life in the extreme.

programme.title: E1 - Born to Be Different
programme.desc: This episode of Amazing Animal Friends features a duck that won’t go in the water without a ride from her pooch pal, an elephant that thinks she’s a buffalo, and a herd of cows that adopt an orphaned deer.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E2 - Class Reunion
programme.desc: Follow new graduate Beni, who gets an exciting introduction to jungle college alongside former classmates Sura, Meryl, and Wine. Check on new arrival Molly and join Dr. Nadine as she grades slowpoke Bumi and wild child Monita on their latest lessons.

programme.title: E5 - A Pangolin's Plight
programme.desc: Feel heartbreak when Dr. Amanda’s team loses a pangolin abused by wildlife traffickers, but cheer when another is released post-rehab. Check on a trio of hedgehogs and tag along as the center’s baboons and nyala antelopes get a change of scenery.

programme.title: E6 - Crocodile Capers
programme.desc: Strap in for Dr. Amanda’s risky attempt to collar a wild roan antelope. Later, chase down blue monkey Indigo while unrest ensues among the vervets. Examine an eagle owl with bumblefoot and say adieu to Sheila the croc, who’s headed back to the wild.

programme.title: E2 - A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends including Charlotte, a schnauzer who enjoys bath time with her guinea pig pal Wallace, and a randy ram called Hamish who likes to sneak off to live with a herd of dairy cows instead of his own kind.

programme.title: E3 - Invisible World
programme.desc: Dive into a dazzling world beyond human perception, where animals use their super senses to detect light we can’t see, sound we can’t hear and even stranger forces we can’t begin to detect.

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 蒼梧國大將軍之女羲和遭滅門及暗算，重生為廢柴嫡女沈千夜。她懷著滿腔不甘踏上復仇之路，與疑似凶手的「小皇叔」裴夙糾纏不休。在調查真相的過程中，兩人從相互算計到聯手抗敵，揭開了蒼梧國隱藏的重重秘密。

programme.title: E10 - 求職者吐槽進大廠的落差
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E6 - 音你家族共創集體歌曲太「上頭」
programme.desc: 五位全新的音樂人梁龍、胡夏、白舉綱、希林娜依·高、黃子弘凡以歌手形象反轉擔任Live House工作人員，以全新的姿態再度開啟這趟音樂旅程。同時，帶著全新口號「總有快樂發聲」，一起共同見證更多生活中的美好與驚喜。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 由李晨、吳尊、何超蓮、劉維作常駐嘉賓，帶領觀眾走進阿根廷、新西蘭、泰國、冰島、土耳其、愛爾蘭等國家駐華大使館，探秘各地文化密碼，復刻地道異國風味，並結合中國特色美食文化打造中外融合料理，開啟以食會友、賓至如歸的文化交流真人秀。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: The Best Of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: E38
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Trailblazing
programme.desc: The feature program 'Trailblazing' on Shenzhen TV fully illustrates Shenzhen's trailblazing exploration and demonstration role as a pilot demonstration zone for socialism with Chinese characteristics. Through the micro recording approach and small entry points in character stories, the program showcases stories of trailblazing exploration and pioneering efforts in Shenzhen, reflecting the major theme of China's high-quality development.

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.
